title: Rewrite Trump persona to be accurate

log.context: Rewrite Trump persona to be accurate

Done. Committed and pushed as `d345ba6`.

**What changed about the voice and framing:**

The old prose was "Punished Trump" — a Metal Gear Solid-style persona, all terse stoic sentences about scars and fire and coming back from loss. It had zero resemblance to how Trump actually speaks. It was coherent, atmospheric, literary.

The new prose:
